title: Biome Piglins
description: This resource pack adds biome variants to Piglins based off of the 3 Piglin Hoards from Minecraft Legends. Currently there are 2 skins for the normal Piglin and the Piglin brute. Zombified Piglins will be added later.
body:
This resource pack adds new biome variants to Piglins and Piglin Brutes based on the Piglin hoards from Minecraft Legends. Currently there are only 2 biome variants for both Piglin types. Zombified Piglins coming soon.

Requires Entity Texture Features.
